gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_after_the_se: After the second dream, you will need to find an Abandoned House
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_if_you_need_: If you need help and get stuck, click this button to go to the wiki page.
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_if_you_think: If you think you are ready for The Abyss Dimension you have probably
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_in_a_forest_: in a forest or plains. In there you will find a Broken Radio.
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_loran_plants: loran plants. You will be teleported back after some time so collect as
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_much_loran_a: much Loran as possible as this is the easiest way to get it.
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_placing_the_: Placing the Obsidian in a portal format and lighting it with the Activator
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_sleep_anothe: sleep another time. Each time you will be dreaming about the abyss.
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_slept_once_a: slept once and twice. If you haven't you will need to sleep once and then
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_the_dream_di: the dream dimension again. The only difference is that you can see
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_unlike_older: Unlike older versions you will not find any loran in the overworld.
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_you_must_the: You must then right click it which will teleport you to
gui.theabyss.wiki_gui.label_you_will_the: You will then need to craft 10 Unstable Obsidian and a Portal Activator.

tooltip.theabyss.ring_consume: Rings consume somnium. You can see how much this ring consumes in the tooltip above.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_crafting: §3This item must be produced in the §5Arcane Workbench.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_blackstrike: §3Ability:§f This ring shoots dark matter. It can also cause nausea and wither effects.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_curse: §3Ability:§f This ring makes all entities weaker and you stronger.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_eagle: §3Ability:§f This ring allows you to see nearby entities through blocks.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_elec: §3 Ability:§f Allows nearby enemies to be paralyzed, taking damage from it as well.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_enderchest: §3Ability:§f With this ring you always have an ender chest with you!
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_fangs: §3Ability:§f Summons Evoker Fangs around you. Be careful.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_firestorm: §3Ability:§f This ring creates a firestorm that burns all entities.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_firestrike: §3Ability:§f This ring shoots fireballs like a blaze but faster.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_flight: §3Ability:§f Lets you fly like in creative mode. Also works in your off hand.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_freeze: §3Ability:§f This ring freezes nearby entities for a short time.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_ghost: §3Ability:§f You become a ghost for 25 seconds! Press X to damage someone or C to burn nearby entities.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_home: §3Ability:§f This ring will take you back to your bed. You must have slept in bed before using it. The ring only works in the overworld.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_inv: §3Ability:§f This ring makes you temporarily invisible.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_jugger: §3Ability:§f This ring creates a nano armor around your skin. However, this will slow you down a bit.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_nature: §3Ability:§f This ring grows plants in a 3x3 block radius.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_nightblade: §3Ability:§f This ring was used by Nightblade. It's unclear exactly what it does since everyone who saw the nightblade died.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_ocean: §3Ability:§f This ring allows you to swim and breathe faster in water.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_pocket: §3Ability:§f Your own mini dimension in the palm of your hand!
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_seeker: §3Ability:§f Summons a seeker that damages enemy entities for you.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_slide: §3Ability:§f This ring lets you fly similar to an elytra, but you can also fly up.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_speed: §3Ability:§f This ring makes you as fast as Sonic the Hedgehog!
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_telekinetic: §3Ability:§f This ring causes nearby entities to fly up.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_teleport: §3Ability:§f With this ring you can teleport to where you are looking.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_thunder: §3Ability:§f This ring rains lightning on nearby entities.
tooltip.theabyss.ring_of_time: §3Ability:§f This ring freezes the time for all nearby entities. The Sandevistan in minecraft!
tooltip.theabyss.ring_upgrade: You can enhance rings by brewing certain potions.
